html:
Exclusive to:

The Directional Sign is a craftable Structure in Don't Starve Together. It can be written on, and it shows up on the map like a regular Sign. Unlike the normal sign, and indeed almost every other entity, the sign's orientation is not fixed relative to the camera. When built, the sign points to the right, and will remain pointing that direction.

The Directional Sign requires Boards to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. If it is destroyed, the Boards are returned, allowing the player to build a new Directional Sign elsewhere.

When first built, the sign is blank, and examining it will yield a character quote. Clicking the sign will bring up a dialog to write on the sign, after which examining the sign will yield whatever has been written on it. Directional Signs cannot be rewritten, but deconstructing a sign with a hammer will return a board, so they can be replaced virtually at will.

When writing on a sign, the dialogue will give the option to cancel, generate random text, or write to the sign. The text box can also be selected and typed into. The random function generates text for the sign which features a random noun based on the type of Turf the sign is placed on, as well a random adjective describing the place. Sometimes there will be an quantifier modifying the adjective, and sometimes there will be an additional phrase after the name, or possibly both. Once written on, the sign will have small lines on it, indicating text.

Part Possible text
Quantifiers Really, Very, Quite, Very Very, Extremely, Moderately, Minimally, Sort of, Totally
Adjectives Sunny, Danker, Dark, Morose, Morbid, Awful, Horrible, Perfectly Normal, Ordinary, Perilous, Dangerous, Hazardous, Creepy, Empty, Lonely, Wet, Dry, Huge, Small, Little, Picturesque, Hideous, Dreary, Repulsive, Boring, Good, Striking, Uninteresting, Fascinating, Magnificent, Souless[sic], Echoing, Sleepy, Smelly, Mediocre, Awesome, Brilliant, Excellent
Nouns
Turf type Possible names
Cobblestones Road, Path
Rocky Crag, Area, Region, Rocky Place
Turfless Patch, Turf, Area, Tract
Savanna Savannah, Grassland, Prairie
Grass Field, Pasture, Meadow, Garden
Forest/Deciduous Forest, Woods, Thicket, Grove
Marsh Marsh, Swamp, Bog, Fen
Web Web, Cobweb
Wooden Flooring Place, Corner, Spot, Base, Hidey-Hole
Carpeted Flooring Place, Corner, Spot, Base, Hidey-Hole, Carpet, Rug
Checkerboard Flooring Place, Corner, Spot, Base, Checkerboard, Zone
Cave Turfs Cave
Sandy Desert, Badlands, Flats
Scaled Flooring Place, Corner, Spot, Base, Hidey-Hole, Zone, Scale
Other Turf (such as from a mod) Spot, Area, Region, Point, Locality, Site
Additions of Perilousness, of Horribleness, of Loneliness, of Sorrow, of Danger, of Hunger, of Shadows, infested with Monsters, crawling with Horrors, of Happiness, of Dreariness, of Death, full of Bees

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Spectacular Stationary Wayfinder skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from December 20, 2018 to January 3, 2019, and from February 28, 2019 to March 7, 2019. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
Woven - Elegant
Next of Kin Collection
Factory Signpost
When it comes to factory safety, proper signage is key.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Fantasmical Collection
Fantasmical Path Marker
Let fluttering butterflies guide you on your path.
Loyal
Side Show Collection
Spectacular Stationary Wayfinder
Restrooms over here.
See ingame

Trivia

  • In spite of the fact that the Savanna biome is coded by that name, the Directional Sign uses the alternative spelling: "Savannah".
  • There appears to be a running joke with Directional Signs, as most of the character quotes for blank and burnt sighs reference "Thataway" in some form

Bugs

  • If the player comes by a Directional Sign, rotates the camera while it is off-screen, then returns to it, the sign will point to the wrong way. Rotating the camera while it is on-screen fixes this.

Gallery

  • A blank Directional Sign.
  • Wilson preparing to write on a Directional Sign.
  • A Directional Sign that has been written on.
  • A burnt Directional Sign.

“That must be some kind of sign.”
–Wanda

Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Loyal Spectacular Stationary Wayfinder skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from December 20, 2018 to January 3, 2019, and from February 28, 2019 to March 7, 2019. It is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
In spite of the fact that the Savanna biome is coded by that name, the Directional Sign uses the alternative spelling: "Savannah".
There appears to be a running joke with Directional Signs, as most of the character quotes for blank and burnt sighs reference "Thataway" in some form
Bugs[edit | edit source]
If the player comes by a Directional Sign, rotates the camera while it is off-screen, then returns to it, the sign will point to the wrong way. Rotating the camera while it is on-screen fixes this.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Biển Chỉ Hướng là một Cấu Trúc có thể chế tạo được trong Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được viết lên và nó hiển thị trên bản đồ giống như một Dấu hiệu thông thường. Không giống như dấu hiệu thông thường và thực tế là hầu hết mọi thực thể khác, hướng của dấu hiệu không cố định so với camera. Khi được xây dựng, biển báo sẽ chỉ về bên phải và sẽ vẫn chỉ về hướng đó.
